_what_this_is: Per-company Time-to-Offer overrides used by lib/tto-estimator.mjs. When the council surfaces fresh TTO intel (e.g., 'Anthropic is currently running a fast-track for Strategic Ops candidates, 3-week cycle'), agents append/update entries here so the next triage run honors the updated estimate. Loaded at triage time.

_how_to_use.companies: Map of slugified-company-name → { weeks (number), tier ('fast'|'med'|'slow'|'glacial'), confidence ('high'|'med'|'low'), source (string), note (optional string), expires_at (optional ISO date — defaults to never)}
_how_to_use.slug_rules: Lowercase the company name, replace any non-alphanumeric run with a single hyphen, trim leading/trailing hyphens. 'Google DeepMind' → 'google-deepmind'.
_how_to_use.auto_update: Agents may write to this file via scripts/agent-commit.mjs whenever they have fresh TTO signal. Manual edits also welcome.
